name: Weekly Engagement Digest
description: Monday 8 AM cron job that queries all active engagements, calculates budget burn, drift percentage, ranks by risk, and emails partners

nodes.name: Calculate Metrics (RPC)
nodes.notes: Calls Supabase RPC function that calculates: total hours logged, budget burned, burn rate, drift %, remaining budget, unscoped hours, projected completion

parameters.subject: Weekly Engagement Health Report - {{ new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', {weekday: 'long', year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric'}) }}
parameters.htmlEmail:
={{ require('fs').readFileSync('emails/weekly_digest_template.html', 'utf-8')
  .replace('{{PARTNER_NAME}}', $item(0).partner_name)
  .replace('{{CRITICAL_COUNT}}', $item(0).engagements.filter(e => e.drift_percentage > 25).length)
  .replace('{{HIGH_RISK_COUNT}}', $item(0).engagements.filter(e => e.drift_percentage > 10 && e.drift_percentage <= 25).length)
  .replace('{{TOTAL_UNSCOPED}}', $item(0).engagements.reduce((sum, e) => sum + e.unscoped_hours, 0).toFixed(1))
  .replace('{{TOTAL_EXPOSED_AMOUNT}}', '$' + $item(0).engagements.reduce((sum, e) => sum + e.unscoped_amount, 0).toFixed(0))
}}
